examples: At midday you will grope about like a blind man in the dark.
I coast into the gas station, kill the engine, grope for my wallet.
They meet with darkness in the day time, and grope in the noonday as in the night.
It seems like at this point Detroit executives will discuss anything as they grope for a way to survive.
Another woman came forward later to report that while in the Cross Keys nightclub she had felt someone grope her bottom.
